name: 7-Block Depth Recurrence + GPTQ + SGD All-Weights TTT (1xH100)
author: swapp1990
blurb: 7 unique transformer blocks (dim=624, 8 heads, 4 KV heads) with depth recurrence (middle 3 shared 3x = 13 effective layers), XSA on all layers, SwiGLU 3x MLP, SmearGate, U-Net skips, Muon optimizer. GPTQ post-training quantization with Hessian-compensated rounding (int5 MLP, int6 attn, int8 embed, zstd-22). SGD all-weights TTT at eval (lr=0.005, momentum=0.9, chunk=2048, score_cap=2048). 46 experiments over 2 weeks. Progression: 1.2987 -> 1.1573 -> 1.1290 -> 1.1172.
